creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

this is interesting.  Sorry for it.  It looks like iwlwifi (driver/fw) reports beacon/connection loss.

Given you have identical HW and are in the same place I assume this ...


I assume you are on the same git hash on both laptops?   Do you have a way to copy over the entire /boot/kernel from the working to the non-working laptop and see if that makes a difference?  It's a silly theory that something may be compile-dependent as we are hunting a similar issue on older chipsets...
